LanguageData.Ammo_66mmThermalBolt_Incendiary.label: 66mm thermal bolt (Incendiary)
LanguageData.Ammo_66mmThermalBolt_Incendiary.descript: Mechanoid-built medium-velocity thermal bolt designed to be fired from a mortar.
